name: Spaghetti Mizithra (Greek-style Spaghetti)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook spaghetti until tender but firm to the bite.
2. Drain well.
3. Melt butter in a large skillet over medium heat and cook just until it turns brown.
4. In a separate bowl, combine the Kasseri and Romano cheeses and chopped parsley.
5. Place the cooked spaghetti on a warm serving platter.
6. Sprinkle the cheese mixture evenly over the pasta.
7. Drizzle with the melted butter.
8. Sprinkle with remaining parsley.
Note: Created by The Spaghetti Factory, Hollywood (C) 1992 The Los Angeles Times
